Local state: agent selection, model selection

agent_data_flow.filter_hook: useFilteredList<AtOption> with groupBy: agent(0) > recent(1) > file(2)

dependency_graph.composer_controls: All Composer* types and functions are PRIVATE to prompt-input.tsx — never exported or imported elsewhere

prompt_popover.pattern: Custom absolute-positioned div, not KobaltePopover — positioned at -top-2 translate-y-full, no portal
prompt_popover.at_limit: atFlat.slice(0, 10) — max 10 items shown in @ popover

composer_picker_popover.props: state-driven: open, placement, gutter, modal, onOpenChange
composer_picker_popover.content: Search input + <For each={items}> + bottom action item

at_mention_system.constraints: query.length <= 100, no spaces or newlines after @
at_mention_system.options: agents first (rank 0), then recent files (rank 1), then all files (rank 2)
at_mention_system.selection: handleAtSelect calls addPart({ type:'agent', name, content }) or addPart({ type:'file', path, content })
at_mention_system.dom_readback: parseFromDOM walks childNodes, identifies pills by el.dataset.type, calls pushFile/pushAgent

slash_command_system.trigger: / character at cursor position 0 (start of editor)
slash_command_system.detection: handleInput checks beforeCursor.lastIndexOf('/'), cursor === 1 (empty editor with '/')
slash_command_system.types: builtin (from command registry) and custom (from sync.data.command)
slash_command_system.selection: handleSlashSelect → clearEditor + command.trigger(cmd.id, 'slash') for builtins; setEditorText('/cmd ') for custom

agent_display.composer_control: ComposerAgentControl renders a Select dropdown with agent names as options
agent_display.composer_control_state: { title, keybind, options: string[], current: string, style, onSelect }
agent_display.agent_pill_in_editor: @name shown as inline <span> with data-type='agent', contenteditable=false

key_findings.finding: The @mention popover system supports two types: 'agent' and 'file'. Agent mentions are derived from sync.data.agent, filtered to exclude hidden agents and the 'primary' mode agent.
The agent list in the composer dropdown (ComposerAgentControl) uses local.agent.list() which filters mode !== 'subagent'. This means subagents are NOT shown in the composer dropdown.

There is NO existing @general mention in the desktop UI. The string '@general' does not appear in the components directory. The 'general' agent name only appears in settings (settings.general.*) — unrelated to the @mention system.

The AtOption type only supports 'agent' and 'file' discriminants. There is no 'subagent' or 'general' or delegation option type. To add @general or @agent delegate mentions, AtOption must be extended.

The agent list for @mentions (agentList, line 584) filters !hidden && mode !== 'primary' from sync.data.agent. But the composer dropdown (local.agent.list, line 64 of local.tsx) filters mode !== 'subagent' && !hidden. These are different datasets — @mentions show the 'primary' agent inclusive, but exclude subagents via different criteria.

The PromptPopover component renders @mentions in a custom positioned div (not Kobalte portal), limited to 10 items. Each agent item shows a brain icon + @name. File items show directory/filename with FileIcon. Agent items appear first (rank 0).

Keyboard navigation in @ popover: ArrowUp/ArrowDown/Enter/Tab navigate and select. Ctrl+N and Ctrl+P also navigate (vim-like). Tab selects the active popover item. Escape closes. The useFilteredList hook provides onKeyDown handler.

Editor DOM model: contenteditable div with child nodes. Text is stored as text nodes. Agent/file @mentions are stored as <span data-type='agent|file'> with data-name/data-path attributes, contenteditable=false. The parseFromDOM function walks childNodes reading dataset attributes.

The handleAtSelect function differentiates between agent and file types. When adding an agent part, it uses addPart({ type: 'agent', name: option.name, content: '@' + option.name }). The addPart function handles pill creation and DOM insertion, including replacing the '@query' text with the pill.

The handleInput function detects @ and / triggers by checking the text before the cursor. For @, it checks that no space or newline appears between @ and cursor. For /, it requires cursor to be exactly at position 1 (start of empty editor).

ComposerAgentControl renders a Select dropdown populated with agent names from local.agent.list(). It has a sliders icon and a TooltipKeybind. ComposerModelControl renders either a ModelSelectorPopover (paid) or a Button (unpaid). Both are state-driven and private to prompt-input.tsx.
Zero test coverage for the @mention system, slash commands, or composer controls. No test files found for prompt-input, slash-popover, ComposerPicker, or any agent display component.

smoking_guns.finding: No existing @general agent mention in desktop UI. The @general suggestion in the prompt is not implemented.
smoking_guns.fix: Add {type:'general'} or {type:'subagent'} discriminant to AtOption, wire into agentList/query pipeline

smoking_guns.finding: AtOption type (line 6 of slash-popover.tsx) only supports 'agent' | 'file'. Cannot represent subagent delegates. Must add a new discriminant for delegation targets.
smoking_guns.fix: Extend AtOption: { type: 'agent' | 'file' | 'delegate'; name: string; display: string; delegate?: string }

smoking_guns.finding: Two different agent list filters exist: agentList (line 584) filters !hidden && mode !== 'primary' for @mentions, while local.agent.list() (local.tsx:64) filters mode !== 'subagent' && !hidden for the composer dropdown. These serve different purposes but use different exclusion logic.
smoking_guns.fix: Add a third agent list for delegation or unify the filter logic with a type parameter

smoking_guns.finding: The @mention query system is coupled to file search (files.searchFilesAndDirectories). The items async function merges agents + pinned files + file search results. Adding a new @mention type would need to be added alongside, not inside, the file search pipeline.
smoking_guns.fix: Separate agent/delegate options from file options in the useFilteredList items function

smoking_guns.finding: Zero tests for the entire @mention/slash/agent display system. Any delegation feature lands without regression safety.
smoking_guns.fix: Add tests for handleAtSelect, handleSlashSelect, addPart, createPill, parseFromDOM, and PromptPopover rendering

steps: 1. Extend AtOption type in slash-popover.tsx — add new discriminant (e.g., {type:'delegate', name, display, delegate?})
2. Add rendering branch in PromptPopover <Match when='at'> for the new type
3. Add agent source to agentList/agentNames memos or create a new delegateList memo
4. Add the new type to atKey function for filtering
5. Handle selection in handleAtSelect — create appropriate ContentPart type or reuse AgentPart
6. Add the new type to createPill with appropriate data attributes
7. Add DOM parsing in pushAgent/pushFile or create pushDelegate in parseFromDOM
8. Add the new part type to ContentPart union in context/prompt.tsx (if needed)
9. Wire keyboard navigation — already handled generically via useFilteredList
10. Add i18n strings for the new type's popover display
minimal_changeset: slash-popover.tsx:69 (_Match when='at' agent branch clone at line 69)

composer_agent_control_extension.approach: ComposerAgentControl already renders a Select with agent names. To add subagent delegation, add a second control or enhance the existing one with a popover/toggle for delegation type.
composer_agent_control_extension.state_shape: ComposerAgentControlState would need {..., delegateOptions?: string[], delegateCurrent?: string, onDelegateSelect?: (value) => void }

i18n_touch_points.usage: Shown when atFlat has no results (empty @ query)
Shown when slashFlat has no results
Badge labels for custom slash command sources

i18n_touch_points.note: When adding delegate @mentions, new i18n keys will be needed for: popover labels, empty states, and tooltip keybinds
